title: Resource Planning for Enterprise
excerpt: Has anyone on Enterprise started to use the new Resource Planning Tools?  The one thing I’m struggling with is when pieces of a project are complete.  It doesn’t remove the allocation from the Resource or Capacity board.…

posts.author: nkahl (Nancy Kahl)
posts.cookedHtml: Has anyone on Enterprise started to use the new Resource Planning Tools? The one thing I’m struggling with is when pieces of a project are complete. It doesn’t remove the allocation from the Resource or Capacity board. Thoughts?
